error: HTTP Error 400: Bad Request - Error rendering prompt with jinja template: Only user and assistant roles are supported!
notes: Midnight-Miqu-70B-v1.5 is a Mixtral-derived model without tool-calling chat template support. Tool use definitions require a system role which this model's prompt template rejects. Model works for normal chat but cannot be used for agentic tool-call benchmarks.
